login.subTitle: Sign in to CLIProxyAPI
login.memoryNote: The key is held in memory only and is lost when the page is closed or refreshed. It is never written to local storage.
login.embeddedFallback: No saved management key was read from the panel ("remember password" may not be checked). Please enter it manually.

keys.empty: No downstream keys yet. Click "New Key" to create one.
keys.rotateConfirm: Rotate the key for {{id}}? The old key becomes invalid immediately.
keys.deleteConfirm: Delete key {{id}}? This cannot be undone.

keyForm.weeklyLimitLabel: Weekly usage limit (USD, 0 = unlimited, rolling 7 days)
keyForm.modelsLabel: Allowed models (multi-select, alias auto = model name)
keyForm.priceLabel: Model unit price (USD / per million tokens; 0 = not billed)
keyForm.colCacheReadHint: Unit price for cache-hit input tokens (prompt-caching read). 0 = charged at the input price. Claude's cache-read tokens are separate from input and billed on their own; OpenAI/Gemini/Codex's cached tokens are a subset of input and are split out and re-billed at this price (no double counting).
keyForm.colRecommendHint: If this model has a reference price in the litellm price DB, click to overwrite this row's three columns (input/output/cache-read) with it. Source is a community-maintained table, for reference only — verify as needed.
keyForm.recommendTitle: Fill this row from the litellm community reference price

picker.empty: No models returned from CPA. Make sure CPA has upstream providers configured.
picker.selected: {{count}} model(s) selected · alias auto = model name

plainModal.warning: ⚠ This is the plaintext key. It is shown only once and cannot be viewed again after closing — save it now.
